_comment: Sample output produced by `python src/checks.py --project my-project --output json`. Each entry is the Finding dataclass shape from src/checks.py.

scan_metadata.benchmark: CIS GCP Foundations v3.0 (subset of 7 controls)

findings.title: Corporate credentials only (no personal Gmail)
findings.detail: No personal Gmail principals found in project IAM policy.

findings.title: Service account key rotation (90 days)
findings.detail: All service account keys are within the 90-day rotation window.

findings.title: Uniform bucket-level access (no legacy ACL)
findings.detail: 1 bucket has uniform bucket-level access disabled: legacy-uploads

findings.title: No public buckets (allUsers / allAuthenticatedUsers)
findings.detail: No buckets grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers.

findings.title: No unrestricted SSH/RDP (0.0.0.0/0 on 22/3389)
findings.detail: No firewall rules allow SSH/RDP from 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: VPC flow logs on all subnets
findings.detail: All 5 subnets have VPC flow logs enabled.
